events.title: Avacyn Vanishes
events.summary: Holy wards weaken across Innistrad and the countryside grows markedly more dangerous.

events.title: Katarina Receives the Resonator
events.summary: Church agents secretly place the Strionic Resonator in Katarina Brunn's care at Shadowgrange.

events.title: Vampires Strike Shadowgrange
events.summary: Voldaren raiders kill Mayor Ralph Brunn and abduct Katarina while the village freezes in fear.

events.title: Siegfried Flees North
events.summary: Broken by grief, Siegfried abandons Shadowgrange and begins raising undead at Mauer Estate.

events.title: Mordov Falls
events.summary: Rinelda leads Siegfried's horde through Mordov, sending refugees south to warn Shadowgrange.

events.title: Army of the Damned Begins
events.summary: The player characters enter Stensia by road and head toward Shadowgrange.
